text: I can't log into my workspace this morning - it keeps saying 'invalid password' even after I reset it twice. Account ref ACC-4021.
Our Slack integration stopped posting notifications about three days ago and none of us can figure out why. Account ACC-4088.
Getting a 500 error every time I try to export a board to CSV. Ref ACC-4132.
The mobile app crashes as soon as I open the calendar view on Android. Same on two different phones. Account ACC-4210.
We can't seem to sync tasks between the desktop app and the web app - changes made on desktop don't show up on the web version. Account ACC-4301.
Two-factor login is stuck on 'sending code' and never actually sends anything. I've been locked out for an hour. ACC-4355.
The API is returning 429 rate-limit errors way below the documented limit for our plan. Ref ACC-4402.
Our webhook to Zapier has stopped firing since yesterday's update. Nothing changed on our end. ACC-4459.
Custom fields I created last week have all disappeared from the project template. ACC-4512.
One of our team members can't see the reporting dashboard even though I gave them admin permissions yesterday. ACC-4566.
Getting duplicate notification emails for every single comment, sometimes five or six for one comment. ACC-4601.
The whole workspace has been down for 20 minutes, nobody on my team can load any boards. Is this a known outage?
SSO login via Okta is throwing a certificate error since this morning. ACC-4677.
Our Jira sync keeps duplicating tickets instead of updating the existing ones. ACC-4720.
I set up a recurring task and it just stopped recurring after the third occurrence, no error, nothing. ACC-4788.
Can't upload attachments larger than 5MB even though the plan says the limit is 50MB. ACC-4833.
A teammate says she got logged out and then logged back in as someone else's account for a second before it corrected itself. Wanted to flag it. ACC-4890.
The search bar returns zero results for tasks I know exist and can see in the board view. ACC-4945.
Timezone on all my deadlines is showing UTC instead of my profile's set timezone since last week. ACC-5001.
We can't remove a former employee from the workspace, the 'remove user' button just spins forever. ACC-5058.
Getting billed for 22 seats but we only have 18 active users - can someone check the invoice? ACC-5112.
I want a refund for last month - we were double-charged and I've emailed twice with no reply. ACC-5166.
This is the third time this month our automations have silently failed with no error and no notification. ACC-5209.
I'm disputing last month's charge - we were billed for the annual plan when we're on month-to-month, and I want it reversed.
This is a GDPR data request - please send us everything you hold on our organisation and delete our old test workspace.
We think we've been hacked - someone logged into our workspace from an IP we don't recognise and changed the admin email.
What compliance documentation do you have for SOC 2? We need it for our own audit and want to make sure we're not breaching anything on our end.
I want to close our account. We're done with the platform - please cancel everything.
Please cancel our subscription effective end of month. We've decided to go a different direction.
I'm ready to close our account - it's ACC-9001, our enterprise workspace. Please process this and confirm.
We need to cancel our subscription on account ACC-9002 - budget got cut this quarter and we can't justify it anymore.
Honestly if the outages keep happening like this we'll have to look at other providers - this is the third one this quarter.
We're seriously considering moving to a competitor if the sync issues don't get fixed soon. It's affecting our whole team's workflow.
This is ridiculous for a paying customer - fix the calendar bug already, we've reported it three times.
We got charged twice for the same seat this month, must be a billing glitch - can you fix it on your end?
We were charged twice for the same seat and honestly this is ridiculous for a paying customer - I want it fixed and reversed now.
Quarterly business review time - can we get 30 minutes next week to go over our usage and roadmap alignment? ACC-6021.
We're renewing next month and want to talk through what's changed since our last contract - any new features we should know about? ACC-6088.
Our team has grown from 15 to 40 people since we signed up - what does that mean for our plan and can we get a health check on our setup? ACC-6142.
We'd like to roll this out to our design team as well, not just engineering - can someone walk us through onboarding a new department? ACC-6205.
Loving the product so far. Wanted to check in on our account health and see if there's anything we're underusing. ACC-6260.
Given how much our team has scaled this year, we'd like to talk about our upcoming renewal and whether there's a better-fit plan.
We're an existing customer (ACC-6301) but wanted to ask through this form - we're expanding into a second office and want to talk about scaling our plan up.
Can we get a call to review our EBR deck before the board meeting? Want to make sure the growth numbers we're presenting are accurate. ACC-6355.
We're onboarding a new department next month (finance, about 25 people) and want a refresher on admin controls. ACC-6410.
Our usage has doubled since Q1 - is there someone we can talk to about whether we're on the right tier? ACC-6466.
Would love a QBR to go through adoption numbers across the org - we've had some teams barely using it. ACC-6520.
We're growing fast and want to make sure our account setup scales with us - can someone review our workspace structure? ACC-6577.
Renewal's coming up in six weeks. Before we sign, can we get a walkthrough of the enterprise tier features we haven't turned on yet? ACC-6631.
We just closed a new round of funding and are planning to triple headcount next year - want to get ahead of what that means for our contract. ACC-6688.
Can someone from the account team check in - we've had three new hires and want to make sure onboarding for them goes smoothly. ACC-6740.
Our exec sponsor wants a business review before end of quarter - usage stats, ROI, the works. ACC-6795.
We're expanding into a new region and want to know if there's anything region-specific we should set up for the new team. ACC-6850.
Hi, what are your plans and pricing for a team of about 12 people?

Following up here since I wasn't sure where else to send this - we want to talk about adding 50 more seats for a new team joining next quarter.
